h70078771gc7dbg4005ga7f3g7595b53b6ddb: *Your head throbs and your skin tingles. Visions rush past: a dragon's wing, a silver sword - and a flash of your face seen through the gith's eyes.*
haafc5ef9g19d5g46bdgbe63gfcf0ca85e293: *Your head throbs and your skin tingles. Visions rush past: a dragon's wing, a silver sword - and a flash of your face seen through the strange woman's eyes.*
h7e21a120g7d4bg48efg9819g0df4c4e10262: Tsk'va. You are no thrall - Vlaakith blesses me this day! Together we might survive.
h5ec38709g4a83g44e7gad50g8727fdcc9f7a: Imps block the path forward. You will assist me in destroying them - we must reach the helm before we transform.
h240b9045g1fc1g4ac5gb831g677535b177d9: Have you forgotten yourself? Unless we escape - unless we are cleansed - our bodies and minds will be tainted and twisted.
hf197b907g8c53g4823ga099g4d3cb90b14e9: We carry mind flayer parasites. Unless we escape - unless we are cleansed - our bodies and minds will be tainted and twisted.
ha48854d1gf33eg4c0bg8750g5254e2d962ee: Within days, we will be ghaik. Mind flayers.
hda138fabgc01fg4f68gb500g9566c1ab76bb: We are turning into mind flayers? There must be something we can do!
h6966c5f0ga2dbg43a1g84aeg7e161ad5b16d: We can do nothing until we escape - that must be our priority.
he29e26deg3194g40c1gb5f0gd126d8e7afa1: Who am I? Your only chance of survival.
h1d1d662egca92g4394g820cg09e21c80fdf5: Is the helm our way out of here?
h4cc62ef8gffb0g4665gab3dg43ce002e5c25: It is where we might gain control of the gh'ath - the ship. Once in command, we will deal with our ghaik captors.
h53574427g8beag41caga24dg3ac4d4a28f10: First, we exterminate the imps. Then we find the helm and take control of the ship.
hae1dd590g7f4cg4f51g94f5g502593a2d731: As for that thing - it will remain tame as long as it believes we are thralls. It may be of use in the fight to come.
h65c62e9cg574ag40bdga242g2828738d4c8f: We will address the matter of a cure for this infection once we reach the Material Plane.
